name: execute_readonly_query
description: Executes a read-only SQL SELECT query against the application database and returns results as JSON. Only SELECT statements are permitted — any attempt to use INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, or DDL statements will be rejected.

sql.description: A valid SQL SELECT statement. Must not contain any data-modifying clauses.

parameters.description: Optional positional parameters for parameterised queries (e.g. [42, 'active']).

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return. Defaults to 100.
